# Saurabh Sudhir Portfolio - PDF Assets Folder

Place all of your original PDF documents directly in this `/public` folder. 

## Upload Instructions
To upload your files so they are visible and accessible by the portfolio:
1. In the **Project Explorer** (the file list on the left side of your AI Studio interface), locate the `/public` folder.
2. If it's not visible, refresh or expand the directory tree.
3. Click the **`...` (Options Menu)** or right-click on the `/public` folder.
4. Select **"Upload Files"** and upload your corresponding PDFs.
5. Make sure the filenames match the expected names listed below **exactly** (case-sensitive).

## Expected PDF Filenames
The portfolio looks for the following filenames in this directory:

1. **`Saurabh_Sudhir_Resume.pdf`** - Your main resume/CV, linked in the Header, Hero, Floating Contacts, and Footer.
2. **`DriveU_Case_Study_Saurabh_Sudhir.pdf`** - Your DriveU Product Case Study, linked in the Work Showcase CTA.
3. **`Saurabh_Sudhir_University_of_Europe_MA_Diploma.pdf`** - Your Master's Degree Diploma, linked in the Education Credentials details panel.
4. **`Sudhir_Saurabh_ma_thesis_ss23.pdf`** - Your Master's Thesis paper, linked in the Academic research project links.
5. **`VISA___UE_1.pdf`** - Your VISA Coin and Trading case study paper, linked in the research project details.
6. **`Business_pitch_.pdf`** - Your INSTANT AI Stress Superapp Pitch Deck, linked in the entrepreneurial project details.
7. **`LISAA_Diploma_Certificate.pdf`** - Your Professional Diploma from LISAA School of Design, linked in the Credentials section.
8. **`Wharton_AI_Decision_Making_Certificate.pdf`** - Your Wharton Executive Education Certificate, linked in the Professional credentials section.

---
*Note: All placeholder PDFs have been removed per your request. The portfolio will now directly reference these filenames.*
